news.t: These ETFs can be your insurance against Fed hikes and rising rates

overview.description: The ProShares Investment Grade-Interest Rate Hedged (IGHG) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund tracks an index with long exposure to USD-denominated investment-grade debt and short exposure to US Treasurys. The fund aims to minimize interest-rate risk. IGHG was launched on Nov 5, 2013 and is issued by ProShares.
infoTable: FTSE Corporate Investment Grade (Treasury Rate-Hedged) Index

data.title: These ETFs can be your insurance against Fed hikes and rising rates
data.text: “Rate-hedged” bond funds can make money when interest rates rise and bond prices fall.
